Watchdog driver interface with functions to initialize, start, feed, and manage reset flags.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions for managing a watchdog timer. The [`watchdog_init`](<#watchdog_init>) function initializes the watchdog timer, while [`watchdog_start`](<#watchdog_start>) begins its operation. The [`watchdog_feed`](<#watchdog_feed>) function resets the watchdog timer to prevent it from triggering a system reset. The [`watchdog_check_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_check_reset_flag>) function checks if a reset has occurred due to the watchdog, and [`watchdog_clear_reset_flag`](<#watchdog_clear_reset_flag>) clears this reset flag. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` indicates that the functions use the `bool` type for boolean operations.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
